query: SELECT id, gameDate, awayTeam, homeTeam, market, pickSide, odds, line, customLine, result, awayScore, homeScore, risk, toWin, riskUnits, toWinUnits FROM tracked_bets WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-04' AND market = 'RL' ORDER BY id;
